'''West Championne''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], located 200 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] south of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and twenty kilometers west of [[Orowood]]. It was heavily damaged when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] took the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
